rows.label: qev031302_MSG0001
rows.name:
...What is this Art of War?
Do you know about the Art of War?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_SEL0021
rows.name: Shake your head and say you don't know.

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I don't understand what that means at all.
War is simply clashing head-on.
Can you strike down an enemy with tactics?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0003
rows.name:
Lately, Sajif has been studying the Art of War
late into the night, but...
Now I know that it's meaningless![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see!
Well, even without knowing such things,
you can fight a war with a trained body and a gun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0005
rows.name:
Lately, Sajif has been studying the Art of War
late into the night, but...
Doing useless things is such a pain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0006
rows.name:
You! If it gets too troublesome,
you can just beat down the underlings at the
Lotus Fortress Construction Site too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0007
rows.name:
You wouldn't really want to do something as cowardly
as an assassination either, would you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Vio! Stop interfering!
I'm the one who hired [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'm not saying anything wrong.
Either way, you can't suppress a fortress
just by defeating the leader![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Then just watch quietly.
And marvel at the greatness of the Art of War![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0011
rows.name:
...So this is the Art of War...
It truly was a strength... that the Bias don't have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0012
rows.name:
Guh... But a way of fighting like this...
I can't accept it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0013
rows.name:
Looks like you beat the enemies all together!
I watched from a distance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031302_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hahahahaha! It was a splendid way to fight!
I'll show Sajif just how much you rampaged![ST:wait ]
